privileged_info_summary: The task 'create_modifier_group@1' asks an agent to use the Floreant POS back office (PIN: 1111) to create a modifier group named 'Cooking Temperature' with exactly five modifiers: Rare, Medium Rare, Medium, Medium Well, and Well Done, each priced at $0.00. Floreant POS is a legitimate open-source Java-based point-of-sale system (floreant.org, established 2008) that uses Apache Derby embedded database. All metadata claims are consistent across task description, verifier logic, and export scripts, and represent reasonable burger cooking temperature options. The task data is synthetic, created by agent interaction with the GUI.
